next_steps: Perform dihydrorhodamine (DHR) flow cytometry to evaluate for NADPH oxidase activity
Check serum immunoglobulin levels (IgG, IgA, IgM) and lymphocyte subsets
Perform genetic testing for CYBB or other CGD-related gene mutations
Repeat biopsy of a hepatic or splenic lesion for specialized molecular testing (e.g., 16S ribosomal RNA gene sequencing)
Obtain specialized infectious disease consultation regarding atypical bacterial pathogens
Discontinue long-term broad-spectrum antibiotics pending definitive molecular diagnosis
